name: Interswitch
description: Interswitch — Nigeria-founded pan-African payment infrastructure company operating Verve card network and Quickteller platform.

seo.title: Interswitch — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Interswitch: Interswitch — Nigeria-founded pan-African payment infrastructure company operating Verve card network and Quickteller platform.

when_to_use: Verve card processing and acquiring for Nigerian and pan-African merchants
Quickteller payment integration for bill payments and transfers in Nigeria
Pan-African payment infrastructure connecting Nigeria to broader African network
Card scheme and payment processing for African banks and fintechs

pros: Owns Verve — Africa's largest local card network
review.verdict: The infrastructure incumbent in African payments — strong if you need Verve and bank rails, rough DX otherwise.
review.best_for: Nigerian and pan-African banks, telcos, and large merchants
review.not_for: Agile startups needing quick Stripe-like onboarding
